headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Hershey (HSY) After Recent 10.7% Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Hershey at around US$192.10 per share still offers value after a strong run, or if the easy money has already been made. The stock is up 20.7% over the last year and 31.9% over five years, even though the last month brought a 10.7% decline and a 23.6% drop across three years. This can change how the market is thinking about its future. Recent news around consumer staples and packaged food names has kept attention on how brands like Hershey balance pricing, input costs, and...
